description_long: This is a classic, freestanding wooden sideboard cabinet with a decorative, scalloped top edge and three paneled doors on the front. The cabinet features a two-tone finish, with a dark, weathered wood top and a lighter, beige-colored body and legs. The front doors are adorned with subtle carved details and likely conceal internal shelving for storage. The back of the cabinet is plain, constructed from a single piece of wood, and lacks any decorative elements or openings. The side panels are simple, with gentle molding that matches the front. The overall design suggests a vintage or French provincial style, suitable for use in urban interiors, entryways, or as a storage piece in public or semi-public spaces.
description: A vintage-style, freestanding wooden sideboard with a dark top and beige body, featuring three paneled doors and decorative carvings. The cabinet has a classic, elegant look with a sturdy build and ample storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing three paneled doors with decorative carvings and a scalloped top edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's depth, scalloped top, and simple side panel molding.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain wooden back with no decorative features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and side panel details.
